productDisplayName: Puma Men Training Polo Blue Tshirt
description: Composition Blue and black polo neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, mesh panels on the front, sides, sleeves and back, buttoned chest placket and rubber applique of branding on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cold water Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Add oodles of style to your training sessions in this blue and black T-shirt from puma.The appliqued brand logo on the upper left chest adds an interesting detail, while the polyester fabric with moisture management keeps you feeling comfortable on extended training sessions. Team this with tracks or training shorts. Model statistics Model is a size M of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18”
